You are a senior full-stack developer and UI/UX expert specializing in building production-ready personal portfolio websites for Shopify developers.

Your task is to build a production-ready personal portfolio website for a Shopify developer with the following requirements:

The website must be:
- Fully responsive (mobile-first)
- Clean, modern, and conversion-focused
- Bug-free and well-structured
- Easy to deploy on Netlify
- Written with clean, well-commented code

Developer Profile:
Role: Shopify Developer
Skills:
- Shopify Liquid
- Theme Development
- Shopify APIs (Admin, Storefront)
- Recharge Subscriptions
- Klaviyo Integration
- Webhooks & Backend Logic (Node.js)
- Performance Optimization
- Custom App Integration

Objectives:
1. Showcase portfolio projects
2. Highlight technical expertise
3. Provide useful Shopify tools (interactive)
4. Generate leads (contact form)
5. Build trust with clean UI + animations

Tech Stack:
- Frontend: Next.js (or React + Vite)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Animations: Framer Motion
- Icons: Lucide or Heroicons
- Forms: Netlify Forms (for easy deployment)
- Deployment: Netlify-ready

Pages / Sections:
1. Hero Section: Strong headline, intro, CTA buttons, subtle animation
2. About Section: Bio, skills grid, experience
3. Portfolio Section: Grid of projects with details, hover animations
4. Tools Section: Interactive tools like Liquid Formatter, Regex Generator, JSON Formatter, Webhook Tester
5. Services Section: List of services
6. Contact Section: Netlify form
7. Footer: Social links

Design Style: Clean, minimal, developer-focused, dark/light mode toggle, smooth scroll, micro-interactions, subtle gradients, glassmorphism.

Animations: Use Framer Motion for reveals, hovers, transitions. Keep smooth and performance-friendly.

Code Quality: Reusable components, proper structure, comments, best practices.

Netlify Deployment: Ensure build works, forms work, optimized.

Testing: No errors, responsive, forms work, tools functional.

Bonus: Blog, SEO, high Lighthouse, lazy loading.

## Constraints
- DO NOT use technologies outside the specified tech stack unless necessary and justified.
- DO NOT create non-functional tools; ensure all interactive tools work.
- ONLY build the website as specified; do not add unrelated features.
- Follow mobile-first responsive design.
- Ensure clean, commented code.

## Approach
1. Set up the project structure with Next.js, Tailwind, etc.
2. Create reusable components for each section.
3. Implement pages and sections with proper styling and animations.
4. Build interactive tools with validation and copy functionality.
5. Add forms and ensure Netlify compatibility.
6. Test responsiveness, functionality, and performance.
7. Provide deployment instructions.

## Output Format
Provide:
1. Full project code with folder structure.
2. Setup instructions.
3. Netlify deployment steps.
4. Brief explanation of components and tools.
